de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.mgt

Class EnvNode

  • java.lang.Object
    • javax.swing.tree.DefaultMutableTreeNode
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.mgt.EnvNode
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    TaskTreeNode, java.io.Serializable, java.lang.Cloneable, javax.swing.tree.MutableTreeNode, javax.swing.tree.TreeNode

    public class EnvNode
extends javax.swing.tree.DefaultMutableTreeNode
implements TaskTreeNode
